documentation.description:
-
  String IO Routienes. This are used because Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Text_IO and GNAT.IO_Aux both have a suttle little
  bug.

subprograms.name: Get_Line
subprograms.code: function Get_Line (File : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type) return Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Unbounded_String

subprograms.name: Get_Line
subprograms.code: function Get_Line (File : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type) return String

subprograms.name: Get_Word
subprograms.code:
function Get_Word
   (File       : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type;
    Delimiters : in Ada.Strings.Maps.Character_Set := Word_Delimiters)
    return Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Unbounded_String

subprograms.name: Get_Word
subprograms.code:
function Get_Word
   (File       : in Ada.Text_IO.File_Type;
    Delimiters : in Ada.Strings.Maps.Character_Set := Word_Delimiters)
    return String

subprograms.name: Get_Word
Read_File
